headlines: Bloomberg: Asian stocks rise on Japan as Iran optimism builds — 日经突破62000创历史新高
Bloomberg: Gold holds hefty gain as US-Iran truce hopes ease inflation fear (金价+3.3%)
Bloomberg: 日本股市因美伊停战预期和科技股上涨跳涨
CNBC: Snap issues cautious guidance citing Middle East geopolitical uncertainty
CNBC: Japan's Nikkei 225 tops 62,000 for first time as Asia markets look past Trump's Iran threats
CNBC: Iran war threatens jet fuel shortage that could disrupt summer travel in Asia and Europe
MarketWatch: Arm puts a big number on its newest venture, but its stock falls
MarketWatch: Fortinet's stock rockets higher as earnings help dispel fears of AI disruption
Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams practices at rival insurers
WTI原油续跌至$96.34 (-5.8%)，美元指数跌至98附近
summary: 隔夜美股三大指数全线收涨，美伊停战预期继续推动风险偏好。S&P 500 +1.46%，纳指+2.02%领涨。亚太方面，日经225突破62000点创历史新高（+4.35%），而恒指早盘小幅回落。大宗商品剧烈分化：WTI原油续跌-5.8%至$96.34，黄金飙涨+3.29%重回$4700上方。美元指数继续走弱至98附近，美债收益率回落至4.36%。今日A股即将开盘，上证昨日收于4160点。加密市场分化，BTC微涨，ETH回调。
